title: A.D.T
description: Version 1.20.1 | It’s not a different game — it’s Minecraft, evolved.
body:
![ADT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e43f3728a221a2febc329845e3a18fffe38b7a7d_0.webp)                    

A.D.T is a Forge-based modpack that reimagines Minecraft as a deeply immersive and realistic world — without breaking the vanilla experience.
Featuring over 200 carefully chosen mods, it enhances every aspect of survival with better visuals, smoother animations, natural lighting, realistic sounds, and quality-of-life improvements.

Build complex machines with Create, explore the universe in Ad Astra, uncover mysterious underground biomes from Alex’s Caves, and interact with realistic villagers through MCA Reborn.

Whether you want to build, explore, or survive, A.D.T keeps the balance between realism and pure Minecraft simplicity.
It’s not a different game — it’s Minecraft, evolved.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S2MjeqPpT1Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

🎮 **Main features:**

Forge 1.20.1 base

immersive & performance-friendly mods

Realistic lighting and shaders

Enhanced survival atmosphere

Compatible with both solo and multiplayer worlds

**Thanks for Downloading A.D.T modpack hope you enjoy**
